breakdown: This PR migrates a 200+ line inline polling script for skeptic VERDICT comments to use a reusable GitHub Actions workflow (skptic-gate-reusable.yml). The migration significantly improves maintainability by externalizing polling logic, retry handling, and timeout management to a reusable component. The old code is cleanly removed (not commented). Minor concerns: workflow pinned to specific commit hash rather than version tag, and test coverage not visible in this diff.
key_changes: Removed complex inline polling script that handled VERDICT comment detection with retries
Added reusable workflow reference using 'uses' syntax with proper inputs (pr_number, head_sha, runner_labels, concurrency_group)
Passed secrets via 'secrets: inherit' to the external reusable workflow
Removed inline error handling (API failures, rate limits) - now delegated to reusable workflow
